Frequently Asked Questions

What information do I need for a consultation?

You'll need your exact date, time, and place of birth. If you don't know your exact birth time, our astrologers can help with birth time rectification.

How do I prepare for my consultation?

Write down your specific questions beforehand. Have your birth details ready. For video consultations, ensure you have a stable internet connection.

Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?

Yes, we offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not satisfied with your consultation, contact us within 24 hours for a full refund.

How soon can I book a consultation?

Most consultations can be scheduled within 24-48 hours. For urgent matters, we offer same-day appointments with available astrologers.

Ready to Get Started?

Book your consultation now and get clarity on your life's important questions.
